evaluators.name: Monthly Youth Scholarship Fund Donation Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user set up a recurring monthly donation to the youth tuition-assistance fund starting on the first day of next month, at the smallest suggested monthly amount ≥ $25, with processing fees covered, and that this donation is the current draft in review.

evaluators.name: Earliest Weekday Evening Audition Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user registered a 10-year-old for the earliest available weekday evening audition slot next month at the primary rehearsal campus that accepts age 10 and starts at or after 5:00 PM.

evaluators.name: Need-based Tuition Scholarship Application Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a scholarship application for the need-based tuition scholarship for the 2025–2026 season, indicated current enrollment, chose an income range with max < $60,000, and provided a written explanation of financial need.

evaluators.name: December Holiday Concert Ticket Order Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user selected two adjacent seats in the mid-priced under-$50 tier for the December holiday concert featuring advanced ensembles, and proceeded to the on-site ticket order review stage.

evaluators.name: Saturday Usher/Front-of-House Volunteer Shift Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user signed up for exactly one open Saturday event-support volunteer shift later in the current month lasting at least 3 hours with usher or front-of-house tags.

evaluators.name: Youth Ensemble Selection and Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user started registration for exactly one youth ensemble that accepts a 13-year-old, rehearses on a weekday ending by 7:30 PM, has annual tuition ≤ $600, for the upcoming season.

evaluators.name: Newsletter Subscription Interests and Frequency Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user subscribed with a placeholder email, selected only Upcoming Concerts and Scholarships & Financial Aid interests, chose a monthly or monthly-digest frequency, and agreed to terms.

evaluators.name: Adult Downtown Free Workshop Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user reserved exactly one spot next month in any free adult (18+) workshop at the downtown location using the on-site registration form for a single participant.
